message:
🐛 Fix GitHub tab: scrolling, partial data caching, username display (#1202)

- Fix scrolling in GitHub contributions tab by using flex-1/min-h-0
  instead of h-full for proper overflow constraint
- Fix silent failure bug where partial results (issues only) would
  overwrite full cached data when PR search fails — now returns error
  so caller falls back to stale cache with complete data
- Show GitHub username (@login) on each contribution line

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
